details.test: Task 1: Select cheapest starter plan < $150 with 1-on-1 coaching & 5+ modules
Task 2: Register for earliest evening intro webinar in next 14 days
Task 3: Create and save earnings plan targeting >= $2,000/month
Task 4: Choose highest-earning program under 10 hours/week with 3+ live sessions
Task 5: Save most recent parent success story $2,500+ working 20–30 hours/week
Task 6: Submit part-time application with $300 budget starting 2026-04-01
Task 7: Subscribe to weekly newsletter for Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy
Task 8: Ask support about extending 30-day money-back guarantee to 60 days
